svg.text: This blueprint gives you the exact steps to go from zero to your first online sale in 30 days.
Follow each week sequentially. Check off each item before moving to the next.

g.text: Pick ONE specific audience + problem you solve. Write it in one sentence.
Example: "I help freelancers organize their finances with simple templates."
Keep it short, memorable, and available as a .com or .co domain.
Tool: namechk.com to check availability across platforms.
Use Namecheap, Cloudflare, or Google Domains. Budget: $10-15/year.
Create accounts on Instagram, Twitter/X, and TikTok with consistent branding.
Same handle, same bio, same profile photo across all platforms.
You have a clear niche, a brand name, a domain, and consistent social presence.
PDF guide, template pack, checklist, mini-course, or Notion template.
Start with the easiest: a PDF or template. Ship fast, iterate later.
Solve ONE specific problem. 5-15 pages max. Done beats perfect.
Use Canva for design. AI for copy. Ship in 2-3 focused sessions.
Create account, upload product, write description, set price ($0-29).
Hero image + 3 bullet benefits + social proof (even if it's your own results).
Formula: Problem + Solution + Outcome + CTA. Keep it simple.
You have a live product on Gumroad ready for customers to purchase.
Total cost: $0 (Gumroad is free) | Time investment: ~8 hours
Pick ONE: Twitter/X for text, Instagram for visuals, TikTok for video.
Go where your audience already hangs out. Don't spread thin.
Batch create in one sitting. Mix: 3 value posts, 2 personal stories, 2 product mentions.
Use Buffer or Later (free tier). Post daily at consistent times.
Comment on 10 posts/day in your niche. Reply to every comment on your content.
Engagement > follower count. Build relationships, not vanity metrics.
You have a content system running and an audience starting to form.
Total cost: $0 | Time investment: ~6 hours + 20 min/day
Post on your platform, share in relevant communities, DM 10 people.
Don't "launch." Just share naturally. "I made this, it might help you."
Ask 3 questions: What did you like? What confused you? What's missing?
Feedback is gold. Every response improves your next version.
Update product, improve listing, adjust price if needed. Ship V2 fast.
Based on Month 1 data, set a realistic but stretching target.
$100/month is a real business. $0 to $1 is the hardest part. You did it.
You've made your first sale and have a clear path to scale.
Total cost: $0 | Time investment: ~6 hours + ongoing engagement
Track your progress. Small numbers are real numbers.
MODULE 2: Product Creation Engine (Templates, Pricing, Packaging)
MODULE 3: Content Operating System (90-Day Content Calendar)
MODULE 4: Sales Funnel Blueprint (Landing Pages, Email Sequences)
MODULE 5: Audience Growth Playbook (0 to 10K Followers)
MODULE 6: Email List Mastery (Lead Magnets, Nurture Sequences)
MODULE 7: AI Automation Stack (Tools, Workflows, Prompts)
MODULE 9: Brand Authority Blueprint (Positioning, PR, Collabs)
GET THE FULL 10-MODULE SYSTEM AT BEHIKE.CO/OS → $97
Perfection kills momentum. A bad V1 beats a perfect V0.
One platform, one product, one audience.
Focus is your only advantage against funded competitors.
Talk to people, not at them.
DMs, replies, and comments build trust faster than posts.
Your first dollar proves the model.
